availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 【Soft Material】Our soft bath sponges are made of fiber sponge, feeling so soft and comfortable; Designed with variable colors so, color may vary. Our ultra soft bath sponge offers a gentle yet effective way to remove dead skin cells, leaving your skin feeling smooth and refreshed.

【Deep Cleansing】Our bath sponge creates a rich lather to thoroughly cleanse while gently exfoliating sensitive skin. Its unique double-sided texture enhances friction to remove dirt, oil, and dead cells from deep within pores without irritation.

【Easy To Use】The 3D sponge hardens when dry and softens when soaked in water, allowing for indefinite reuse. The unique design of these sponges allows for a relaxing massage experience while scrubbing, promoting circulation and leaving your skin feeling invigorated.

【Multi-function of The Sponge】Our bath sponge is not just for exfoliation - it can also be used for daily cleansing and removing impurities from the skin. Exfoliating the pores and lifting unwanted dirt and oils with ease, leaving your skin feeling deeply cleansed.

【Wide Application】Ideal for men, women, and kids alike, these bath sponges cater to the entire family's exfoliation and cleansing needs. Make your skin smooth and delicate in circular shape to remove the dead skin. Enjoy a gentle exfoliation wherever you are, ensuring your skin stays smooth and radiant at all times.
description: Product description Bath Massage Sponge - Exfoliating Body Shower Scrubber Directions Soak the sponge in water to soften it before use. Apply soap or body wash to the sponge and use it in a circular motion to gently exfoliate and cleanse the skin. After use, allow the sponge to dry completely between uses to maintain its longevity. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. To prevent bacterial growth, allow the sponge to dry completely after each use and replace every 2-3 weeks. See more
